title: Comments to transfer to Monday from Github

posts.author: kfitz (kayla)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be very helpful if the updates in Github transferred over to the updates in Monday dev. I’m finding that I still need to navigate to the Github item as the PM to be able to view more details into the actual work being done.

What are you trying to achieve

Simplifying our product management teams processes. Currently, the PM team is navigating between Monday.com and Github for more information on the work that is happening. While the engineers could copy their notes in Monday.com, that is still duplicative work we are trying to avoid. It would be a nice to have for it to automatically appear in the updates on the item on Monday.com.
